home.heroSubtitle: Our proprietary algorithm connects your profile to a network of active, niche-relevant users — delivering guaranteed reach and organic momentum.
home.platformSectionTitle: Where do you want to grow?
home.instagramCardDesc: AI-powered audience targeting optimized for the Instagram algorithm. Reach real users in your niche and build lasting organic momentum.
home.tiktokCardDesc: Viral amplification engine built for TikTok's recommendation algorithm. Maximize discoverability and scale your audience fast.
home.step1Desc: Enter your public profile handle. We never ask for your password or login credentials.
home.step2Desc: Our algorithm maps your content category, audience demographics, and optimal growth vectors.
home.step3Desc: Your profile is deployed across our premium audience network. Measurable results begin within minutes.
home.feat1Desc: Fully aligned with platform guidelines. Zero account risk — ever.
home.feat2Desc: Every campaign targets real, active users within your niche matched by our AI.
home.feat3Desc: See measurable momentum within minutes. Our system activates instantly upon order.
home.feat4Desc: Every tier includes a results guarantee and 30-day retention commitment.
home.feat5Desc: Our algorithm continuously optimizes campaign targeting for maximum growth velocity.
home.feat6Desc: Real-time visibility into your campaign performance with clear, honest metrics.
home.faq1Q: How does your AI-powered growth technology work?
home.faq1A: Our proprietary algorithm analyzes your profile, content niche, and target demographics to deploy your account across our premium audience network. This drives qualified, active users to discover your profile organically — resulting in genuine engagement and sustainable growth.
home.faq2Q: How quickly will I see results from my campaign?
home.faq2A: Most campaigns begin delivering measurable profile momentum within minutes of activation. Full network amplification completes within 24-72 hours depending on your selected growth tier.
home.faq3Q: Is my account safe with Reachopia?
home.faq3A: Absolutely. We never request your password or login credentials. Our system only requires your public username. All growth methods are 100% compliant with platform guidelines.
home.faq4A: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and cryptocurrency. Every transaction is secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.
home.faq5A: Every campaign is backed by our Results Guarantee. If we cannot deliver the agreed-upon reach metrics, you receive a full refund plus a 30-day retention commitment.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join 50,000+ creators and brands using Reachopia's AI engine to build unstoppable social momentum.

pricing.faq1A: After you configure your growth campaign and complete payment, our AI engine begins optimizing your profile's reach. Campaigns are distributed over 24-72 hours to ensure organic, algorithm-friendly growth.
pricing.faq2Q: Is my account secure during the campaign?
pricing.faq2A: Yes. Our systems operate entirely externally. We never ask for your login details, ensuring your account remains 100% secure and under your full control.
pricing.faq3A: Yes. After configuring your campaign goals, you can select which of your recent videos should receive prioritized promotion and amplification.
pricing.faq4A: Our AI targets active, real users within your niche. Campaign delivery is paced gradually to match organic patterns. Some natural fluctuation over time is expected.
pricing.faq5Q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq5A: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
pricing.faq6A: If we are unable to deliver on the agreed campaign metrics, you will receive a full refund. Contact our support team if you experience any issues.

faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our AI-powered growth service for Instagram and TikTok.
faqPage.faq1Q: Do I need to share my password?
faqPage.faq1A: Absolutely not. We never ask for your password. Our AI only needs your public username to analyze your profile and deliver targeted growth. Your account security is our top priority, and we use industry-standard encryption for all data processing.
faqPage.faq2Q: Is there any risk of my account getting banned?
faqPage.faq2A: Zero risk. We use 100% organic growth methods that fully comply with Instagram and TikTok's terms of service. Unlike spammy bots, our AI targets real, active users in your niche through authentic engagement patterns. Your account stays safe and grows naturally.
faqPage.faq3Q: How long does it take to see results?
faqPage.faq3A: Your campaign activates in under 60 seconds after payment. First results typically appear within 1-12 hours depending on your pack size. Larger campaigns may take up to 24-48 hours for full delivery as we prioritize quality and organic pacing to keep your account safe.
faqPage.faq4Q: Are these real accounts interacting with my profile?
faqPage.faq4A: Yes, 100% real and active accounts. Our AI-powered audience engine identifies profiles that match your niche, interests, and demographics. These are genuine users who are likely to engage with your content long-term, not fake bots or inactive accounts.
faqPage.faq5Q: Is it a one-time payment or a subscription?
faqPage.faq5A: One-time payment only. No hidden subscriptions, no automatic renewals, no surprise charges. You pay once for the growth pack you choose, and that's it. Want more growth later? Simply come back and purchase another campaign whenever you're ready.
faqPage.faq6A: Yes, we offer a Results Guarantee. If your campaign doesn't deliver the promised reach within the specified timeframe, we'll issue a full refund—no questions asked. We're confident in our AI technology and stand behind every campaign we run.
faqPage.ctaSubtitle: Our support team is here to help. Or start your growth journey now and see the results for yourself.

footer.brandDesc: Proprietary AI audience-targeting engine for Instagram & TikTok. Trusted by 50,000+ creators worldwide.

about.heroSubtitle: We use artificial intelligence to connect creators and brands with premium, niche-relevant audiences — driving real discovery and lasting algorithmic momentum.
about.tech1Desc: Our proprietary algorithm analyzes content categories, hashtag ecosystems, and engagement patterns to identify the highest-intent users within your exact niche.
about.tech2Desc: Your profile is deployed across our premium audience network with gradual, algorithm-friendly delivery patterns that mimic natural organic discovery.
about.tech3Desc: We never request passwords or credentials. Every campaign operates within platform guidelines using organic audience targeting exclusively. Zero risk to your account.
about.tech4Desc: Monitor every metric in real-time — engagement velocity, profile visits, follower growth rate, and audience demographics — with full transparency.
about.tech5Desc: Our deployment engine uses variable-speed delivery patterns calibrated to each platform's detection thresholds, ensuring maximum safety and organic appearance.
about.teamSubtitle: Engineers, data scientists, and growth strategists at the intersection of AI and social media.
about.faq1A: Yes. Our growth methodology is 100% platform-compliant. We never request passwords or access tokens. All campaigns operate through organic audience targeting via our proprietary network — your account is never at risk.
about.faq2Q: How long has Reachopia been operating?
about.faq2A: Reachopia has been engineering social media growth solutions for over 5 years, serving thousands of creators, brands, and agencies worldwide with AI-driven campaign technology.
about.faq3A: Every campaign includes a performance guarantee. If we fail to deliver the agreed-upon reach metrics, you receive a full refund. We also offer a 30-day retention commitment on all growth tiers.
about.faq4Q: Which platforms does your AI support?
about.faq4A: Our algorithm currently supports Instagram and TikTok growth campaigns. We are actively expanding our audience network to additional platforms.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of creators using our AI to build unstoppable social momentum.

contact.why3Desc: Having issues with payment, account setup, or campaign metrics? Our team resolves technical problems fast.

igPage.heroSubtitle: Tap a volume to instantly configure your growth campaign. Results guaranteed.
igPage.how1Desc: Enter your username. Our AI scans your content category, hashtags, audience demographics, and engagement patterns.
igPage.how2Desc: We reverse-engineer Instagram's algorithm to identify high-intent users in your exact niche who are most likely to engage.
igPage.how3Desc: Your profile is amplified across our audience network with gradual, algorithm-safe delivery that mimics natural discovery.
igPage.feat1Desc: AI maps your top-performing content categories to target users who actively engage with similar accounts.
igPage.feat2Desc: We prioritize users with high engagement tendencies — not just follower count — for authentic, lasting growth.
igPage.feat3Desc: Increased profile visits and engagement signals boost your visibility in Instagram's Explore and Reels algorithms.
igPage.feat4Desc: Track your campaign performance with transparent metrics and watch your momentum build in real-time.
igPage.socialProofDesc: Real results from real accounts using our AI-powered Instagram growth platform.
igPage.faq1Q: How does your Instagram AI targeting work?
igPage.faq1A: Our algorithm analyzes your content category, hashtag usage, audience demographics, and engagement patterns to identify ideal users within your niche. We then deploy your profile across our premium audience network, driving organic discovery from real, active Instagram users.
igPage.faq2Q: Will this affect my Instagram account safety?
igPage.faq2A: Never. We don't require your password or login credentials — only your public username. Our methods are 100% compliant with Instagram's guidelines and use organic audience targeting exclusively.
igPage.faq3Q: How fast will I see results?
igPage.faq3A: Most campaigns begin delivering measurable profile momentum within minutes. Full deployment completes within 24-72 hours with gradual, algorithm-friendly delivery patterns.
igPage.faq4A: Yes. Every campaign is backed by our Results Guarantee. If we cannot deliver the agreed-upon reach metrics, you receive a full refund.
igPage.faq5A: Higher tiers unlock faster deployment speeds, advanced niche targeting, dedicated growth specialists, and extended retention guarantees.
igPage.ctaSubtitle: Scroll up and pick your volume — activation takes 60 seconds.

ttPage.heroSubtitle: Tap a volume to instantly configure your viral campaign. Results guaranteed.
ttPage.how1Desc: Enter your username. Our AI scans your content style, sounds, hashtags, and engagement velocity patterns.
ttPage.how2Desc: We reverse-engineer TikTok's recommendation engine to identify high-intent users who engage with content like yours.
ttPage.how3Desc: Your profile is amplified across our network with engagement-velocity optimization — signaling TikTok's algorithm to push your content wider.
ttPage.feat1Desc: Rapid initial engagement signals tell TikTok's algorithm your content deserves wider distribution — triggering the viral snowball effect.
ttPage.feat2Desc: We optimize the key signals TikTok uses to rank content: watch time, shares, comments, and profile visits — all from real users.
ttPage.feat3Desc: Increased profile authority and engagement velocity push your content into more For You Pages, search results, and suggested accounts.
ttPage.feat4Desc: Monitor your growth metrics in real-time and watch your TikTok momentum build with transparent, honest analytics.
ttPage.socialProofDesc: Real results from real accounts using our AI-powered TikTok growth platform.
ttPage.faq1Q: How does your TikTok AI targeting work?
ttPage.faq1A: Our algorithm analyzes your content style, sound usage, audience signals, and engagement velocity to map optimal growth vectors. We then deploy your profile across our network of active TikTok users who match your niche — driving organic discovery through the For You Page algorithm.
ttPage.faq2Q: Will this affect my TikTok account safety?
ttPage.faq2A: Never. We don't require your password or login credentials — only your public username. Our methods are 100% compliant with TikTok's community guidelines and use organic audience targeting exclusively.
ttPage.faq3Q: How fast will I see results?
ttPage.faq3A: Most campaigns begin delivering measurable profile momentum within minutes. Full deployment completes within 24-72 hours with gradual, algorithm-friendly delivery patterns that maximize For You Page visibility.
ttPage.faq4Q: Can this help my videos go viral?
ttPage.faq4A: Our AI amplification engine increases your engagement velocity — one of the key signals TikTok's algorithm uses to push content to the For You Page. Higher initial engagement creates a snowball effect for organic reach.
ttPage.faq5A: Higher tiers unlock faster deployment speeds, advanced niche targeting, dedicated growth specialists, and extended retention guarantees. The Accelerate tier offers the best balance of virality potential and ROI.
ttPage.ctaSubtitle: Scroll up and pick your volume — activation takes 60 seconds.

reviews.r1: The best platform to grow your TikTok account. I've been looking for it for a long time and I finally found it. It provides organic followers. I recommend it.
reviews.r2: I've already tried several TikTok growth services. None really did the trick until Reachopia. I highly recommend it!
reviews.r3: Everything was delivered exactly as I ordered. I have nothing to complain about and customer service was there to answer my questions.
reviews.r4: I was skeptical about using a growth service, but Reachopia exceeded my expectations. Their customer service was excellent.
reviews.r5: I've been using Reachopia for 3 months and after trying many services, I can confidently say it's one of the most reliable.
reviews.r6: Since I switched to them, everything has been stable and works great. I also love their service. Everything I bought elsewhere kept disappearing.
